data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate whether the waiting room feature is enabled by default, as specified in the requirement. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the default state of the waiting room feature. The linked use case mentions the waiting room but does not explicitly state that it is enabled by default, leading to a gap in the validation of this requirement.
gaps: Waiting room default state not confirmed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
